// SHAMUS (Synapse Software, 1983) -> Apple-1 + carte GEN2 HGR (Uncle Bernie)
// Source: TheBestGames.2mg (ProDOS /BEST.GAMES/SHAMUS, BIN @ $0B00). Lancement: 0B00R
//
// GRAPHISME : soft switches $C05x -> GEN2 $C25x (ecritures GEN2 ignorees: STA->BIT, STA,X->LDA,X)
// SON       : $C030 -> ACI TAPE OUT ; BELL Monitor $FF3A -> routine en RAM
// CLAVIER   : latch logiciel en RAM basse $9900+ (kbd_read cache I/J/K/L/SPACE au jeu)
// CONTROLES : joystick/paddle -> clavier I=haut J=gauche K=bas L=droite, SPACE=tir
// BOOT      : credit titre (page 2) -> 'UNCLE BERNIE GEN2 APPLE-1 PORT'
//
// shims @ $9900 (kbd_read $9900, kbd_clear $992D, bell $9938, kbpaddle $9948, kbbutton $996E, latch $997F)
9900: AD 11 D0 10 06 AD 10 D0 8D 7F 99 AD 7F 99 10 1C
9910: 29 7F C9 49 F0 14 C9 4A F0 10 C9 4B F0 0C C9 4C
9920: F0 08 C9 20 F0 04 AD 7F 99 60 A9 00 60 48 AD 7F
9930: 99 29 7F 8D 7F 99 68 60 A0 C0 A9 20 38 E9 01 D0
9940: FB AD 30 C0 88 D0 F3 60 AD 7F 99 10 18 29 7F E0
9950: 00 D0 0A C9 4A F0 11 C9 4C F0 10 D0 08 C9 49 F0
9960: 07 C9 4B F0 06 A0 80 60 A0 00 60 A0 FF 60 AD 7F
9970: 99 10 09 29 7F C9 20 D0 03 A9 80 60 A9 00 60 00
